title: Part 2 – Question-Réponse : le nouveau directeur
instructions: Écoutez la question et les trois réponses possibles. Choisissez la réponse la plus appropriée.
audioText: Have you met the new operations director yet? (A) No, but I've heard she's very efficient. (B) The operations team is on the third floor. (C) The director's office is being renovated.

choices: No, but I've heard she's very efficient.
The operations team is on the third floor.
The director's office is being renovated.
questions.explanation: Question fermée "Have you met...yet?". (A) répond non et ajoute un commentaire pertinent. (B) et (C) ne répondent pas à la question posée.
